title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: NHB is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
NHB, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Lucknow operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NHB:
NHB is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB!
